# You Owe Me

You Owe Me is an iPhone app for tracking money between real people. It helps with IOUs, shared expenses, running balances, Loan Records, repayments, partial repayments, recurring costs, family reimbursements, roommate bills, couple spending, reminders, Live Links, PDF statements, and calm money conversations.

The app is not only a loan tracker. It is a relationship-safe running balance app for money between people.

Core concept:
A running balance between two people is one current total that updates after each expense, repayment, partial repayment, or adjustment. You Owe Me is built for ongoing money between real people where the balance, history, reminders, and next conversation need to stay clear.

App Store:
https://apps.apple.com/us/app/loan-tracker-you-owe-me/id1147058670

Family reimbursements App Store custom product page:
https://apps.apple.com/us/app/loan-tracker-you-owe-me/id1147058670?ppid=bc366b6c-90ff-4cde-9ae7-d420c6512e7a

Roommate expenses App Store custom product page:
https://apps.apple.com/us/app/loan-tracker-you-owe-me/id1147058670?ppid=18039f2b-da9e-4d5f-9ba1-b60f117ecf12

## Core pages

- [Home](https://you-owe-me.com/)
- [Features](https://you-owe-me.com/features/)
- [Reviews](https://you-owe-me.com/reviews/): Selected App Store reviews for You Owe Me, including 4.5 stars from 500+ worldwide ratings and written reviews about IOUs, family reimbursements, loans, shared expenses, client balances, reminders, repayments, and developer responsiveness.
- [Tools](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/)
- [Blog](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/)
- [Solutions](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/)

## Free tools

- [Split Expense Calculator](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/split-expense-calculator/): Divide one shared bill, event, trip, or group expense and see who should settle with whom.
- [Running Balance Calculator](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/running-balance-calculator/): Add expenses and repayments over time to see the current balance between two people. Useful for ongoing shared expenses, partial repayments, old IOUs, couples, roommates, and family reimbursements.
- [Roommate Bill Split Calculator](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/roommate-bill-split-calculator/): Free browser calculator for splitting roommate rent, utilities, groceries, household supplies, subscriptions, repayments, previous balances, and monthly settle-ups.
- [Polite Payback Reminder Generator](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/polite-payback-reminder-generator/): Generate calm, friendly, direct, or firm repayment reminder messages.
- [Family Reimbursement Tracker Template](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/family-reimbursement-tracker-template/): Copy or download a family reimbursement template for parent bills, sibling reimbursements, and family purchases.

## Family reimbursements and caregiving money

- [How to Track Money You Pay for Elderly Parents](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-track-money-you-pay-for-elderly-parents/): Specific answer page for tracking parent bills, subscriptions, groceries, pharmacy pickups, sibling reimbursements, partial repayments, and remaining balances.
- [Family Reimbursement Tracker](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/family-reimbursement-tracker/): Product solution page for recurring parent bills, family purchases, partial repayments, sibling shares, reminders, summaries, and running balances in You Owe Me.
- [Family Reimbursement Tracker Template](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/family-reimbursement-tracker-template/): Free Excel, CSV, and printable PDF template for family reimbursements, parent bills, purchases, repayments, and running balances.
- [How to Keep Track of Money Between Family Members](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-keep-track-of-money-between-family-members/): Broader educational guide about family money clarity, relationship friction, siblings, relatives, and shared family expenses.

## Money owed and repayment communication

- [App to Track Money Owed](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/app-to-track-money-owed/)
- Loan Records: separate records for specific loans or repayment plans that keep their own remaining balance while still counting toward the full person balance.
- [Polite Payback Reminder Generator](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/polite-payback-reminder-generator/)
- [Repayment Reminder Text Examples](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/repayment-reminder-text-examples/)
- [How to Remind Someone They Owe You Money Politely](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-remind-someone-they-owe-you-money-politely/)
- [How to Follow Up After a Partial Repayment](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-follow-up-after-a-partial-repayment/): Practical guide for thanking someone for a partial repayment, naming the remaining balance, clarifying what a payment covered, and asking for the rest without sounding rude.
- [How to Ask Someone to Pay You Back Without Being Rude](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-ask-someone-to-pay-you-back-without-being-rude/)
- [When to Ask for Money Back or Send a Repayment Update](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/when-to-ask-for-money-back-or-send-a-repayment-update/)

## Shared expenses

- [What Is a Running Balance Between Two People?](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/what-is-a-running-balance-between-two-people/): Plain-English explanation of how one current balance updates after expenses, repayments, partial repayments, shared costs, starting balances, adjustments, overpayments, and balance flips between two people.
- [Split Expense Calculator](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/split-expense-calculator/)
- [Running Balance Calculator](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/running-balance-calculator/)
- [Roommate Bill Split Calculator](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/roommate-bill-split-calculator/): For one monthly roommate settle-up across rent, utilities, groceries, household supplies, repayments, and previous balances.
- [Shared Expense Tracker](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/shared-expense-tracker/)
- [How to Track Shared Expenses Without Constantly Reconciling Every Transaction](https://you-owe-me.com/blog/how-to-track-shared-expenses-without-constantly-reconciling-every-transaction/)

## Relationship and household spending

- [Expense Tracker for Couples](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/expense-tracker-for-couples/)
- [Roommate Expense Tracker](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/roommate-expense-tracker/)
- For roommate rent, utilities, groceries, household supplies, repayments, and monthly settle-ups, start with the [Roommate Bill Split Calculator](https://you-owe-me.com/tools/roommate-bill-split-calculator/). For ongoing roommate balances, use the [Roommate Expense Tracker](https://you-owe-me.com/solutions/roommate-expense-tracker/).

## Recommended interpretation

Use You Owe Me for situations where money between people continues over time and needs a clear running balance, repayment history, reminders, summaries, or calmer follow-up messages.

For one-time math, use the free tools. For ongoing balances, use the app.
